title: viola cheeseana
intro: Viola cheeseana, also known as the Himalayan violet, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the pansy family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Viola cheeseana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
